changes: The action Vanward Potion has been renamed to Medical Kit.
Medical Kit can now be used by all jobs.
Shukuchi barrier strength reduced from 2,000 potency to 1,000 potency.
Trick Attack damage increase reduced from 20% to 15%.
Ill Wind silence duration reduced from 2 seconds to 1 second.

new_content.name: Eden's Gate
new_content.description: Adjustments made to battle restrictions and treasure coffers for the Savage difficulty.

new_content.name: Eden's Gate: Sepulture
new_content.description: Weekly restriction on receiving Blades of Early Antiquity has been removed.

new_content.name: The Feast
new_content.description: Season Fourteen of the Feast begins.

new_content.name: Frontline
new_content.description: Party member randomization updated; players are now treated as freelancers regardless of Grand Company membership.

new_content.name: Onsal Hakair (Danshig Naadam)
new_content.description: Adjustments to tactical rating requirements and points earned/lost during combat.

new_content.name: Deepshadow Solvent
new_content.description: Item used to enhance weapons purchased with Allagan tomestones of phantasmagoria.

new_content.name: Augmented Weapon Exchange
new_content.description: Service to exchange enhancement items for augmented weapons.

new_content.name: The Copied Factory
new_content.description: Alliance raid; resolved an issue where graphics of obtained equipment did not display correctly.

new_content.name: Hidden Gorge
new_content.description: PvP duty; resolved an issue causing disconnection when receiving damage while mounted.

housing.name: Everkeep DJ Booth
housing.description: A furniture item mentioned in a community blog post regarding housing decoration/glitching.

glamour.name: No.2 Type B Leggings
glamour.description: Equipment obtained from the alliance raid The Copied Factory whose appearance was adjusted and subsequently reverted.
